name: SFFISBOLSEVAKDRES
definition:
Create procedure [dbo].[SFFISBOLSEVAKDRES]
@FB_REF AS INT

AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
DECLARE @FIS_TURU		NVARCHAR(10)
DECLARE @REFLER AS NVARCHAR(4000) SET @REFLER=''
BEGIN
	DECLARE @KS AS INT
	SELECT @KS=COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SF.SEVK_ADRES_REF FROM STOKHAREKETLERI SH WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN SIPARISFISLERI  SF WITH(NOLOCK)  ON SF.SB_REF=SH.SB_REF  WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF AND ISNULL(SF.SEVK_ADRES_REF,0)<>0 GROUP BY SF.SEVK_ADRES_REF)A
	IF @KS>0 
	BEGIN
		DECLARE @SEVK_ADRES_REF AS INT SET @SEVK_ADRES_REF = NULL
		DECLARE @FD_REF AS INT SET @FD_REF=0
		SELECT TOP 1 @SEVK_ADRES_REF=SF.SEVK_ADRES_REF,@FIS_TURU=SH.FIS_TURU FROM STOKHAREKETLERI SH WITH(NOLOCK)  LEFT OUTER JOIN SIPARISFISLERI  SF WITH(NOLOCK)  ON SF.SB_REF=SF.SB_REF   WHERE SH.FB_REF=@FB_REF 

		IF @KS=1 BEGIN GOTO SON END											
		DECLARE @SEVK_ADRES_REF2 AS INT
		DECLARE @loop AS INT SET @loop=1
RR:
		SET @loop=@loop+1
		IF @loop=10000 GOTO SON
		SET @FD_REF=NULL
		SET @SEVK_ADRES_REF2=NULL  
		SELECT TOP 1 @SEVK_ADRES_REF2=SF.SEVK_ADRES_REF,@FD_REF=SH.FD_REF FROM STOKHAREKETLERI SH WITH(NOLOCK)  LEFT OUTER JOIN SIPARISFISLERI  SF WITH(NOLOCK)  ON SF.SB_REF=SF.SB_REF  WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF AND ISNULL(SF.SEVK_ADRES_REF,0)<>ISNULL(@SEVK_ADRES_REF ,0)
		IF @FD_REF IS NULL BEGIN GOTO SON END
		DECLARE @NEWID AS INT
		DECLARE @SNUM AS NVARCHAR(100) 
		SELECT @SNUM=MAX(CONVERT(NVARCHAR,(FIS_NO))) FROM STOKFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE FIS_TURU=@FIS_TURU
		IF @SNUM IS NULL SET @SNUM='0000001'
		DECLARE @DN AS NVARCHAR(100) 
		EXEC YENI_NUMARA @SNUM,@DN OUTPUT
		--DECLARE @FREF AS INT SET @FREF=(SELECT FIRMA_REF FROM SIPARISFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF2)
		DECLARE @FREF AS INT SET @FREF=(SELECT FIRMA_REF FROM STOKFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF)
		
		INSERT INTO STOKFISLERI(TARIH,SAAT,FIS_TURU,FIS_TIPI,FIS_GCD,FIS_NO	,BELGE_NO,AMBAR_KODU,HEDEF_AMBAR,FIRMA_REF,ISTASYON_KODU,FIS_TOPLAMI,INDIRIM_TOPLAMI,KDV_TOPLAMI,GENEL_TOPLAM,KULLANICI_REF,AKTIF,SISTEM_TARIHI,ACIKLAMA,TICARI_GRUP,OZELKOD,VARDIYA,VARDIYA_TARIHI,FBO_REF,IADE_TARIHI,SB_REF  ,AKTAR,LG_NO,LG_REF,HU_NO,HU_REF,OLUSTURMA_TARIHI,KAPATILMA_TARIHI,GUNCELLEME_TARIHI,PB_REF,AKTAR_ERR,TMENUREF,TFICHEREF,ISEMRI_NO,ALAN1,ALAN2,ALAN3,ALAN4,SEVK_FIRMA_REF,SEVK_ADRES_REF,GKULLANICI_REF,EPOSTA,PAKET_NO,UB_REF,KARGO_AKTAR,KARGO_AKTARERR,SAYIM_STATUS,SAYIM_TURU,TASIYICI_KODU,TESLIM_SEKLI,PROJE_REF  ) 
								SELECT TARIH,SAAT,FIS_TURU,FIS_TIPI,FIS_GCD, @DN,BELGE_NO,AMBAR_KODU,HEDEF_AMBAR,@FREF,ISTASYON_KODU,FIS_TOPLAMI,INDIRIM_TOPLAMI,KDV_TOPLAMI,GENEL_TOPLAM,KULLANICI_REF,1	 ,SISTEM_TARIHI,ACIKLAMA,TICARI_GRUP,OZELKOD,VARDIYA,VARDIYA_TARIHI,FBO_REF,IADE_TARIHI,SB_REF,AKTAR,LG_NO,LG_REF,HU_NO,HU_REF,OLUSTURMA_TARIHI,KAPATILMA_TARIHI,GUNCELLEME_TARIHI,PB_REF,AKTAR_ERR,TMENUREF,TFICHEREF,ISEMRI_NO,ALAN1,ALAN2,ALAN3,ALAN4,SEVK_FIRMA_REF,@SEVK_ADRES_REF2,GKULLANICI_REF,EPOSTA,PAKET_NO,UB_REF,KARGO_AKTAR,KARGO_AKTARERR,SAYIM_STATUS,SAYIM_TURU,TASIYICI_KODU,TESLIM_SEKLI,PROJE_REF FROM STOKFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) 
								WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF SET @NEWID=SCOPE_IDENTITY()
		UPDATE STOKHAREKETLERI SET FB_REF=@NEWID
		--,FIRMA_REF=@FREF  
		WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF AND ISNULL((SELECT SEVK_ADRES_REF FROM SIPARISFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF=STOKHAREKETLERI.SB_REF),0)=ISNULL(@SEVK_ADRES_REF2,0)
		UPDATE STOKFISLERI SET AKTIF=0 WHERE FB_REF=@NEWID 
		SET @REFLER= @REFLER+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@NEWID ) +','
		GOTO RR
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN GOTO C0 END
SON:
		UPDATE STOKFISLERI SET AKTIF=0,SEVK_ADRES_REF=@SEVK_ADRES_REF , KAPATILMA_TARIHI=GETDATE() WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF
END
C0:
		IF LEN(@REFLER)>0 BEGIN SELECT @REFLER+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@FB_REF ) END 
		ELSE BEGIN SELECT CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@FB_REF ) END
